notes: Mapped from Microsoft Azure free services page. retail_names link entries to Azure Retail Prices API serviceName values.

always.name: Azure AI Search
always.limit: 50 MB storage for 10,000 hosted documents and 3 indexes per service

always.name: Azure Language
always.limit: 5,000 text records

always.name: AI Bot Service
always.limit: 10,000 premium channel messages and unlimited standard channel messages

always.name: Speech to Text
always.limit: 5 audio hours per month for Realtime Speech to Text

always.name: Text to Speech
always.limit: 0.5 million characters per month for Standard Neural Voices

always.name: Speech Translation
always.limit: 5 audio hours per month for Real-time Speech Translation (with Standard Voice)

always.name: Translator
always.limit: 2 million characters of standard and custom translation per month

always.name: Face
always.limit: 30,000 transactions of Free instance

always.name: Machine Learning
always.limit: Free

always.name: Data Factory
always.limit: 5 low-frequency activities

always.name: App Service
always.limit: Up to 10 web or API apps with 1 GB storage and 1 hour per day

always.name: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
always.limit: AKS cluster management is free; node resources bill

always.name: Batch
always.limit: Free orchestration; compute pools bill
always.notes: Batch account is free; underlying VM pools bill.

always.name: Functions
always.limit: 1 million requests

always.name: Static Web Apps
always.limit: 100 GB bandwidth per subscription, 2 custom domains and 0.5 GB storage per app

always.name: Azure Container Storage
always.limit: Free tier for deployments with storage pool capacity under 5 TiB

always.name: Container Apps
always.limit: 180,000 vCPU seconds, 360,000 GiB seconds, and 2 million requests

always.name: Service Fabric
always.limit: Free
always.notes: Cluster management free; underlying VMs bill.

always.name: Azure Cosmos DB
always.limit: 1,000 request units per-second provisioned throughput with 25 GB storage
always.notes: Perpetual free tier per subscription (separate from 12-month new-account allowance).

always.name: Azure SQL Database
always.limit: Up to 10 databases with 100,000 vCore seconds of serverless tier and 32 GB storage each

always.name: Database Migration Service
always.limit: Free Standard Compute

always.name: App Configuration
always.limit: 1,000 requests per day with 10 MB storage

always.name: Azure DevOps
always.limit: 5 users with unlimited private Git repos

always.name: Azure Arc
always.limit: Free Azure control plane for resources outside Azure

always.name: Azure Active Directory B2C
always.limit: 50,000 active users per month (MAU)

always.name: API Management
always.limit: 1 million monthly calls free with Consumption tier

always.name: Event Grid
always.limit: 100,000 operations per month

always.name: Logic Apps
always.limit: 4,000 built-in actions with the Consumption plan

always.name: Azure Maps
always.limit: 1,000 to 5,000 transactions for mapping and location features

always.name: IoT Hub
always.limit: 8,000 messages per day and 0.5 KB message meter size of Free edition

always.name: Automation
always.limit: 500 minutes of job runtime

always.name: Azure Policy
always.limit: Free access to configuration and change tracking features

always.name: Cost Management
always.limit: Free
always.notes: May not appear as a billable retail service.

always.name: Monitor
always.limit: Free amounts per feature (see Azure Monitor pricing)

always.name: Resource Manager
always.limit: Free
always.notes: ARM resource groups, deployments, and tags — no retail service meter.

always.name: Notification Hubs
always.limit: 1 million push notifications with free namespace

always.name: Bandwidth (Data Transfer)
always.limit: 100 GB outbound
always.notes: Always-free monthly allowance; separate 15 GB for new accounts in first 12 months.

always.name: Network Watcher
always.limit: 5 GB storage with 1,000 checks, 10 tests, and 10 connection metrics

always.name: Private Link
always.limit: Free
always.notes: Official page lists Private Link as free; private endpoints still bill hourly and for data processed.

always.name: Virtual Network
always.limit: 50 virtual networks

always.name: Security Center
always.limit: Free policy assessment and recommendations

always.name: Azure SignalR Service
always.limit: 20 concurrent connections per unit and 20,000 messages

always.name: Web PubSub
always.limit: 20,000 messages per unit per day and 20 concurrent connections per unit (1 unit max)
